---
title: "Saurabh Parate"
subtitle: "Digital Marketer & Marketing Analyst"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "On This Page"
    toc-depth: 2
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

## 👋 Professional Summary

Digital Marketer with **4+ years of experience** in SEO, digital
advertising, and social media strategies. Currently pursuing **M.S. in
Digital Marketing & Analytics** at Cal Poly Pomona.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 💼 Experience

#### 🏫 Student Digital Marketing Assistant

**Cal Poly Pomona (CBA)** · Pomona, CA `Oct 2024 – Present`

> Updated 100+ webpages · Generated 600+ leads · Managed Google & Meta
> Ads campaigns

- Updated 100+ webpages using Cascade CMS
- Generated 600+ admission leads via Google Ads and Meta Ads
- Supported campus event promotions and CBA's digital presence

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 🤝 Digital Marketing Volunteer

**Trauma Resource Institute** · Claremont, CA `Oct 2024 – Apr 2025`

> \$10K Google Ads · SEO Strategy · Social Media Optimization

- Managed a \$10K Google Ads Grant campaign for the TRM program
- Oversaw SEO strategy to improve organic search rankings
- Optimized social media for visibility and engagement

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 📢 Digital Marketing Assistant Manager

**Anaccord Web World Pvt. Ltd.** · Nashik, India `Mar 2024 – Jul 2024`

> Election Campaign · ₹10L Google Ads · ₹10L Meta Ads

- Led digital marketing for a Lok Sabha MP election campaign
- Managed team of graphic designers and video editors
- Handled ₹10L Google Ads and ₹10L Meta Ads budgets

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 📈 Sr. Digital Marketing Executive

**Great Ideas in Action LLP.** · Nashik, India `Sept 2022 – Sept 2023`

> 6+ Projects · SEO · PPC · Lead Gen · Data Analysis

- Managed marketing for 6+ projects across E-commerce, Jewellery, SaaS,
  and more
- Ran campaigns on Google, Facebook, LinkedIn, Amazon, Pinterest, and
  Quora
- Delivered insights via Google Analytics, Search Console, and Looker
  Studio

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 🔍 SEO Executive

**Simplified Software Solutions** · Mumbai, India `Jun 2022 – Sept 2022`

- Managed SEO for 3+ projects in Agriculture, Education, SaaS, and
  Medical
- Conducted keyword research, site audits, and content optimization
- Optimized landing pages for Google & Meta Ads

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 📣 Digital Marketing Assistant

**Mitra Agro Equipment Pvt. Ltd.** · Nashik, India `Mar 2020 – Jun 2022`

- Executed campaigns across Google, Facebook, LinkedIn, Quora, and
  Pinterest
- Managed SEO, Google Search Console, and Google My Business
- Led WhatsApp, SMS, and Email marketing strategies

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 🎓 Digital Marketing Intern

**Mitra Agro Equipment Pvt. Ltd.** · Nashik, India `Dec 2019 – Mar 2020`

- Supported organic growth across Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, and
  LinkedIn
- Created social media content and assisted with video editing

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🎓 Education

| Degree                             | Institution             | Year           |
|------------------------------------|-------------------------|----------------|
| M.S. Digital Marketing & Analytics | Cal Poly Pomona         | 2024 – Present |
| MBA, Digital Marketing             | Amity University, India | 2022 – 2024    |
| B.Tech, Agriculture Engineering    | K.K.W College, Nashik   | 2015 – 2020    |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🛠️ Skills

| Category     | Tools & Skills                                           |
|--------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| Analytics    | Google Analytics (GA4), Looker Studio, Microsoft Clarity |
| Paid Ads     | Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads                       |
| SEO          | On-page, Off-page, Keyword Research, Link Building       |
| Social Media | Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter, YouTube          |
| Automation   | Email, SMS, WhatsApp Campaigns                           |
| Other        | Microsoft Office Suite, CRM (Vtiger)                     |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🏆 Certifications

**Google** — Ads Search, Display, Video, Shopping, Measurement,
AI-Powered Performance, Digital Garage

**HubSpot** — Digital Marketing, Inbound Marketing, Social Media,
Content Marketing, SEO (I & II), Email Marketing

**Other** — SEMrush SEO Toolkit, Microsoft Advertising, Amazon Sponsored
Ads, LinkedIn Marketing Solutions

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📬 Contact

|  |  |
|----|----|
| 📧 Email | contact\@saurabhp.com |
| 📞 Phone | (840)-243-8505 |
| 🌐 Website | [saurabhp.com](https://saurabhp.com) |
| 💼 LinkedIn | [linkedin.com/in/saurabh-parate](https://linkedin.com/in/saurabh-parate) |
